pinpoint.smstemplate.CfnAbout: Creates a message template that you can use in messages that are sent through the SMS channel. A *message template* is a set of content and settings that you can define, save, and reuse in messages for any of your Amazon Pinpoint applications.

pinpoint.smstemplate.Body.Description: The message body to use in text messages that are based on the message template.

pinpoint.smstemplate.DefaultSubstitution.Description: A JSON object that specifies the default values to use for message variables in the message template. This object is a set of key-value pairs. Each key defines a message variable in the template. The corresponding value defines the default value for that variable. When you create a message that's based on the template, you can override these defaults with message-specific and address-specific variables and values.

pinpoint.smstemplate.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

pinpoint.smstemplate.TemplateDescription.Description: A custom description of the message template.

pinpoint.smstemplate.TemplateName.Description: The name of the message template.
